title: The Fourth Noble Truth - Positive Morality - Parami
justification: This talk provides the most systematic and complete coverage of all ten perfections (paramis), treating each one with clear definitions, practical examples, and accessible explanations. It has excellent literary flow, moving from generosity through to equanimity with memorable anecdotes (the Jataka tale of Kundaka, the silver ring story) and practical guidance. The structure is ideal as a chapter spine—it introduces the concept of parami, explains each perfection in sequence, and concludes with how they interconnect, making it perfect for grafting complementary material.
summary: A comprehensive Foundation Course talk systematically explaining all ten perfections (paramis) as virtues leading to liberation, with practical examples and the teaching that practicing any one perfection naturally develops all others. The talk balances doctrinal clarity with accessible guidance for daily practice.

relevance.note: Primarily about the ten perfections (pāramī) in detail
